title: [Oath of amnesty for Jonathan Thornton]
note: Civil War-era loyalty/amnesty oath. Names the swearing party; relevant for confederate-property tracing. WPA Federal Writers' Project slave narratives, 1936-1938. ~2,300 first-person interviews with formerly enslaved people. Each narrative names former owners, plantations, locations. Critical Black-ancestry evidence stream. Top-level metadata only here; specific narrative texts fetched on-demand by extractor.
